case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. LINDA CALICA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100039332)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CALICA, LINDA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-2018
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100029278), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED SEP-01-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALICA, LINDA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-18-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 100038439) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2018 CONTINUED TO DEC-18-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
